user_scenarios.user_goal: As a wiki crawler user, prove that a trusted source can be fetched, approved, ingested, indexed, linked, and validated with durable evidence.
prerequisites: Local Python dependencies for crawler_workbench are available.
Crawler workbench frontend dependencies and Playwright browser runtime are available.
steps: Run the backend crawler fixture workflow.
Run the Playwright source subscription browser flow against an isolated crawler backend.
Click the crawler workbench navigation item named 来源订阅.
Click 信任同站 for a pending accelerator candidate.
Inspect result.json and summary.md in the output directory.
Confirm domain and full wiki validation succeeded.
Confirm the browser flow reports source-subscriptions-user-flow as pass.
expected_outcomes: At least one raw crawler evidence file is written.
Domain and full wiki validation return zero issues.
The Playwright flow sends POST /api/accelerator-candidates/{id}/trust-source to a real backend.
The source subscription UI shows the same-site trust success notice and refreshes accepted source profiles.
The output evidence includes the Playwright JSON report and HTML report directory.
The output result.json reports status pass with evidence paths.
failure_signals: No raw evidence file is created.
The queue never contains an approvable task.
The ingest task fails or remains pending.
The 来源订阅 navigation click does not show the source subscription page.
The 信任同站 click does not call the backend trust-source endpoint.
The backend accepts the request but the UI does not update the notice, candidates, or source list.
The output directory lacks result.json or summary.md.
cleanup: Remove .codex/wiki-crawler-e2e/ if a clean rerun is needed.
